ns0:entry.ns0:title: Agent-Field/agentfield
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Agent-Field/agentfield
Language: go
Build, run and scale AI agents like API and microservices - observable,auditable and identity-aware from day one.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CJackHwang/ds2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CJackHwang/ds2api
Language: go
Deepseek to API: A lightweight, high-performance full-stack middleware converting client protocols to universal APIs. Supports multi-account rotation, compiled binaries, Vercel Serverless, and Docker. Compatible with Google, Claude, and OpenAI API formats.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Gentleman-Programming/engram
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/engram
Language: go
Persistent memory system for AI coding agents. Agent-agnostic Go binary with SQLite + FTS5, MCP server, HTTP API, CLI, and TUI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumNous/new-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api
Language: go
A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tencent/WeKnora
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tencent/WeKnora
Language: go
Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: actions/actions-runner-controller
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/actions/actions-runner-controller
Language: go
Kubernetes controller for GitHub Actions self-hosted runners

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aquasecurity/trivy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aquasecurity/trivy
Language: go
Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: caddyserver/caddy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/caddyserver/caddy
Language: go
Fast and extensible multi-platform HTTP/1-2-3 web server with automatic HTTPS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: containerd/containerd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/containerd/containerd
Language: go
An open and reliable container runtime

ns0:entry.ns0:title: everywall/ladder
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/everywall/ladder
Language: go
Selfhosted alternative to 12ft.io. and 1ft.io. Proxy to remove CORS headers and modify HTML

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/consul
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/consul
Language: go
Consul is a distributed, highly available, and data center aware solution to connect and configure applications across dynamic, distributed infrastructure.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/terraform-mcp-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform-mcp-server
Language: go
The Terraform MCP Server provides seamless integration with Terraform ecosystem, enabling advanced automation and interaction capabilities for Infrastructure as Code (IaC) development.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: projectdiscovery/nuclei
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/projectdiscovery/nuclei
Language: go
Nuclei is a fast, customizable vulnerability scanner powered by the global security community and built on a simple YAML-based DSL, enabling collaboration to tackle trending vulnerabilities on the internet. It helps you find vulnerabilities in your applications, APIs, networks, DNS, and cloud configurations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: qax-os/excelize
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/qax-os/excelize
Language: go
Go language library for reading and writing Microsoft Excel™ (XLAM / XLSM / XLSX / XLTM / XLTX) spreadsheets

ns0:entry.ns0:title: seaweedfs/seaweedfs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/seaweedfs/seaweedfs
Language: go
SeaweedFS is a distributed storage system for object storage (S3), file systems, and Iceberg tables, designed to handle billions of files with O(1) disk access and effortless horizontal scaling.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wavetermdev/waveterm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wavetermdev/waveterm
Language: go
An open-source, AI-integrated, cross-platform terminal for seamless workflows
